ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cryptocurrencies" (
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cryptocurrency */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the cryptocurrency (e.g., Bitcoin) */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol used to represent the cryptocurrency (e.g., BTC) */,
  "launch_date" TEXT /* Date when the cryptocurrency was launched */,
  "market_cap_rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the cryptocurrency based on market capitalization */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the cryptocurrency */,
  "whitepaper_url" TEXT /* URL to the official whitepaper */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the cryptocurrency's logo */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the cryptocurrency is currently active */,
  "block_time" INTEGER /* Average time between blocks in the blockchain */,
  "block_reward" REAL /* Reward for mining a new block */,
  "algorithm" TEXT /* Consensus algorithm used (e.g., Proof of Work, Proof of Stake) */,
  "max_supply" REAL /* Maximum supply of the cryptocurrency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crypto_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market data entry */,
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cryptocurrency */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the market data entry */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening price of the cryptocurrency on that date */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price of the cryptocurrency on that date */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price of the cryptocurrency on that date */,
  "close" REAL /* Closing price of the cryptocurrency on that date */,
  "volume" REAL /* Trading volume of the cryptocurrency on that date */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the cryptocurrency on that date */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the exchange where the data is from */,
  "trading_volume_usd" REAL /* Trading volume in USD */,
  "change_24h" REAL /* Percentage change in price over the last 24 hours */,
  "change_7d" REAL /* Percentage change in price over the last 7 days */,
  "volume_change_24h" REAL /* Percentage change in trading volume over the last 24 hours */,
  "num_trades" INTEGER /* Number of trades on the given date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_crypto_id FOREIGN KEY ("crypto_id") REFERENCES cryptocurrencies ("crypto_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES exchanges ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exchange */,
  "exchange_name" TEXT /* Name of the cryptocurrency exchange (e.g., Binance) */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the exchange */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the exchange is located */,
  "api_endpoint" TEXT /* URL to the API endpoint of the exchange */,
  "supported_cryptocurrencies" TEXT /* JSON array of supported cryptocurrencies */,
  "api_key_required" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if an API key is required for access */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the exchange (e.g., active, maintenance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trades" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the exchange where the trade occurred */,
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cryptocurrency traded */,
  "trade_date" TEXT /* Date when the trade was executed */,
  "trade_price" REAL /* Price at which the trade was executed */,
  "trade_volume" REAL /* Volume of cryptocurrency traded */,
  "trade_type" TEXT /* Type of trade (buy/sell) */,
  "trade_fee" REAL /* Fee charged for the trade */,
  "trade_status" TEXT /* Status of the trade (e.g., completed, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES exchanges ("exchange_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_crypto_id FOREIGN KEY ("crypto_id") REFERENCES cryptocurrencies ("crypto_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., investor, analyst, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "is_verified" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the user is verified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_portfolios" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who owns the portfolio */,
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cryptocurrency owned */,
  "amount_owned" REAL /* Amount of cryptocurrency owned by the user */,
  "purchase_price" REAL /* Purchase price of the cryptocurrency */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date when the cryptocurrency was purchased */,
  "current_value" REAL /* Current value of the owned cryptocurrency */,
  "profit_loss" REAL /* Profit or loss from the investment */,
  "is_locked" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the portfolio entry is locked (e.g., for long-term investments) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_portfolios_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_portfolios_crypto_id FOREIGN KEY ("crypto_id") REFERENCES cryptocurrencies ("crypto_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who set the alert */,
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cryptocurrency for which the alert is set */,
  "alert_price" REAL /* Price at which the alert should be triggered */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., above, below) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Status of the alert (active or inactive) */,
  "alert_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the alert (e.g., daily, hourly) */,
  "alert_medium" TEXT /* Medium of the alert (e.g., email, SMS) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was created */,
  "last_triggered" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last time the alert was triggered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_crypto_id FOREIGN KEY ("crypto_id") REFERENCES cryptocurrencies ("crypto_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news" (
  "news_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the news article */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL to the full article */,
  "published_date" TEXT /* Date when the article was published */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the article */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author of the news article */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the news article */,
  "is_featured" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the article is featured */,
  "crypto_ids" TEXT /* JSON array of cryptocurrencies related to the article */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("news_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend */,
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cryptocurrency associated with the trend */,
  "trend_description" TEXT /* Description of the trend */,
  "trend_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the trend observation */,
  "trend_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the trend observation */,
  "trend_type" TEXT /* Type of trend (e.g., bullish, bearish) */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the trend prediction */,
  "source_data" TEXT /* JSON array of data points used to derive the trend */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trends_crypto_id FOREIGN KEY ("crypto_id") REFERENCES cryptocurrencies ("crypto_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "api_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user accessing the API */,
  "api_endpoint" TEXT /* Endpoint accessed in the API */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of access */,
  "response_time" REAL /* Time taken to respond to the API request */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "request_method" TEXT /* HTTP method used (e.g., GET, POST) */,
  "request_body" TEXT /* JSON of the request body */,
  "response_code" INTEGER /* HTTP response code */,
  "is_successful" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the request was successful */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_api_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each setting */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the setting (e.g., alert_threshold) */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the setting */,
  "is_admin_only" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the setting is only changeable by admin */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the setting was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the setting was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id")
)
